item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
This article was missing the

« SCP-2540 | SCP-2541 | SCP-2542 »

I added it.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Overall, I quite like it, upvoted.

However, I would add a bit of exposition about exactly what happens when you first enter the hallucination. You are greeted by a 2541-1, who I assume tells you whats about to happen and allows you to leave if, say, you are a devout nun who stumbled upon this video by mistake?

Also, I would add somewhere before you get thrown into the orgy, a "magic mirror" which you can use to change your appearance. This prevents two problems. One, the poor 500 lb former firefighter with hideous burn scars covering 50% of his body (including his face), crying in the corner because no one (understandably) wants to "play" with him. Two: Anonymity! To prevent you suddenly realizing, as you're about to orgasm from the wonderful oral sex you're receiving, that the older woman in the corner over there (who looked kind of familiar), making the increasingly loud and pleased sounding noises, is… YOUR MOM! Ick! Ick! Ick! :P.

Lastly, if, as seems likely, one gets told what the whole hallucination is about and is offered a speedy exit, then I would not label this as cognitohazardous. Maybe call it an anomalous cognitoeffect, rather than hazard?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: The pun actually wasn't, but I only just now caught it. Good catch!

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Yes it is :D was that pun at the end not intentional? :D

item.title: Re: Author Post
item.content:encoded:
Bold of you to assume this is sexier than the cyborg mosquito.

:P

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I hope that’s a good you fucker?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Good eye catching most of those, though some of them I can explain!

1. It’s not that it can only be used by researchers of Level-2 Clearance and lower, it’s that researchers of Level-2 Clearance and lower are restricted from using it.

2. Lifting from feels too informal, which is why I went with ceasing upon. This is a personal preference.

3. Because both rude actions and language to a degree of inappropriateness is bad to go through.

Otherwise, thank you for liking it!

Edit: Made a few corrections grammar-wise

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I like the idea, unexpectedly wholesome and fun! But there are a bunch of sentences that are phrased weird, it broke my immersion…

+ A few examples, and my opinion on why it sounds awkward
– hide block

Use of SCP-2541 is restricted to personnel with clearance below Level-2

Wouldn't it be restricted to ABOVE (or "personnel […] are restricted FROM using […]")? Or is senior staff hornier, thus creating a need to limit their access lest they develop an addiction?

all feature an icon of a stylized yellow lemon somewhere on its packaging

It should be "on their packaging", shouldn't it?

[subjects] report the feeling of intercourse […] as feeling "incredibly realistic"

Double feeling! The second one is unneeded. ("subjects report the feeling of intercourse […] to be incredibly realistic").
Also using quotation marks makes it sounds like all subjects worded it the same way, with the word "incredibly"… If it's a citation from one subject, maybe "The feeling has been reported" would work better than "Subjects report".

ceasing the cognitohazardous effect upon affected subjects

"ceasing upon" doesn't sound valid, how about "lifting from" maybe?

expresses repeated inappropriate or unwanted behavior upon

same, why not "show inappropriate behavior towards"

I'd guess that most people in the Foundation that would rather keep their kinks private.

Stray "that"!

But the story is good, promoting consent and sex-positivity is always nice, and the security guard and Bobs are really likeable!

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
PoI-7058-B: We're hoping we last a bit longer than most.

you fucker… +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Thank you so much! I really appreciate that you think it’s one of your favorites!

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
This is absolutely fantastic! This is easily going into my collection of favorite SCP. Good work Author, and thank you for a enjoyable read!

The only part I didn't get right away was.

human subjects who directly view SCP-2541 will appear to fall into a catatonic state.

I'm probably just stupid for not knowing what "Catatonic" was
Other than that it was well put together.
+1 all the way.

item.title: Author Post
item.content:encoded:
Gotta eventually write something sexier than a cyborg mosquito

This whole idea originated from a newspaper headline about mentally masturbating and Varaxous pitched the idea of everyone learning it so we could all masturbate each other.

I hope you all enjoyed reading! Big thanks to FloppyPhoenix, Wydness, Uncle Nicolini, Gabriel Jade, MaliceAforethought, DrAnnoyingDog, and RockTeethMothEyes for crit!

Also, thank you for doing the photoshop on my lemon logo, magnadeus!
